description_long: This object is a modern, stealth-inspired military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept delta wings. The wings are broad and seamlessly integrated into the body, featuring subtle control surfaces and no visible external engines, suggesting an advanced design. The cockpit is positioned at the forward section, enclosed with a tinted canopy, and appears to be single-seat. The tail section is equipped with twin canted vertical stabilizers, enhancing its stealth profile and maneuverability. The surface is finished in a matte gray color with minimal markings, contributing to its low-visibility appearance. No landing gear is visible, indicating it may be retracted or not modeled in this representation.
description: A sleek, gray, stealth-style military jet with swept delta wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, sharply swept wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, angular wing integration, and twin canted tail fins.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin canted vertical stabilizers and the broad, delta-shaped wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the aerodynamic profile and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Jet, engines not externally visible, likely integrated within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable, not visible in current views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy.
